mechanism: A&E pushes maturities into a period of declining CLO demand, while CLO reinvestment expiration removes the marginal buyer that historically absorbed refinancing supply. Interaction creates a demand vacuum precisely when extended maturities come due.
regime_dependence: Mitigated if SOFR declines 100-150bp restoring CLO reset economics; amplified if rates hold and new CLO formation stays below 15% hurdle.
